description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a white lever handle at the top. The front features a large, rectangular label with green and red instructional graphics and text, indicating its use for various fire types. A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side of the cylinder. The extinguisher's body is smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The top assembly includes a nozzle and a visible hinge mechanism for the handle. No mounting bracket or pressure gauge is visible, and the safety pin is not clearly shown.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a white handle, black hose, and instructional label on the front. The body is smooth and glossy with a black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, white handle, and black hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the plain red back, white handle, and the absence of labels or additional features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the smooth red cylinder, white handle, and the black hose curving along the side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the black hose running vertically and the plain red surface with no labels.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label with green and red graphics and text on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, curving down the side, with a nozzle at the end; hose is unsecured and hangs freely.
